allow: Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./2024companion.json'\); console.log\('propertyDefs count:', Object.keys\(d.propertyDefinitions || {}\).length\); console.log\('masteryDefs count:', Object.keys\(d.masteryDefinitions || {}\).length\); const props = Object.entries\(d.propertyDefinitions || {}\); console.log\('first 3 props:', JSON.stringify\(props.slice\(0,3\), null, 2\)\);")
